## Type of change

- [ ] New adapter

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/ -v`
- [ ] Linting passes: `ruff check cctvql/`
- [ ] New code has docstrings
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if adding an adapter — compatibility table)
- [ ] `config/example.yaml` updated (if adding new config options)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added under `[Unreleased]`
